name: Crab Roll Hors D'Oeuvre
directions: Season slightly with your choice of the following: salt cream onion sherry pepper tabasco mustard Worcestershire Remove all cartilage from crabmeat.
Very gently mix crab with cream cheese, being careful not to break the pieces.
Shape into a log, sprinkle with parsley, chill, and serve with crackers.

name: Clarence's Crab Dip
directions: Chop onions in blender or processor.
Be careful of adding liquid to the dip and making it runny.
Chop crab into small (but identifiable) pieces.
Combine the cream cheese and sour cream in blender/processor.
Add the spices and blend well.
Add onions and crab and mix well. (Mix by hand to avoid chopping the crab into smaller pieces).
Store in refrigerator for several hours.
If dip is too runny, add some dehydrated onions to absorb the excess liquid.
Serve on crackers, chips or vegetables.

name: Crusty Crab
directions: Combine all ingredients and chill.
Serve with sliced, crusty French bread.

name: Crab-Cucumber Salad in Tomato Cups
directions: Gently mix together all ingredients; except tomatoes and chill.
Serve in tomato cups.
If you can't make the cups;put salad on a bed of sliced tomatoes.

name: Crab Dip
directions: Heat mushroom soup and cream cheese, do not boil.
Add gelatin, crab and mayonnaise.
Add celery and onion.
Refrigerate a couple hours to set.  Best if refrigerated overnight.
Stir a little before serving.

name: Crab or Shrimp Dip
directions: Cream together cream cheese and mayo.
Stir in remaining ingredients except Worcestershire, using a WOODEN SPOON.
Add 1/2 the Worcestershire; mix and taste before adding any more.
Chill well at least a hour.
garnish with shrimp or cheese and paprika.

name: Shrimp and Crab Gazpacho
directions: In a food processor, place the garlic and tomatoes; blend until a rough-chop stage.
Dice peppers and green onions.
In a large mixing bowl, place the crushed tomatoes, cucumbers, peppers, green onions, olive oil, lemon juice and salt; mix well.
(if desired you may process all of the veggies for a smoother texture, if you prefer a chunky gazpacho, then leave the veggies chopped).
Chill for 2 hours.
Ladle into small soup bowls.
Cut the shellfish into bite-size pieces, and divide equally among the bowls.
Top with croutons, and freshly ground black pepper.
